name: Devilish Potato Stacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Use enough instant mashed potato flakes for 4 servings.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Mix meat, deviled ham, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl until combined.
4. Shape the mixture into four patties using an ice cream scoop or your hands.
5. Place the patties in an ungreased baking dish measuring 8 x 8 x 2-inches.
6. Prepare the potato puffs according to package instructions, but reduce water to 1 cup.
7. Stir the cottage cheese and half the onions into the potatoes until well mixed.
8. Top each patty with a quarter of the potato mixture.
9. Sprinkle the remaining onions over the patties.
10. Bake uncovered for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the patties reach the desired doneness.
11. Remove the patties from the baking dish using a slotted spoon and serve on a serving plate.
